hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Test-Path homework-6/src) { Push-Location homework-6/src; try { python ../scripts/check_coverage.py --min 80; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Host 'Coverage gate check failed (< 80%). Consider running tests before proceeding.'; exit 1 } } finally { Pop-Location } }"
